description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, metallic body with articulated limbs and a distinctively shaped head. Its face is equipped with two prominent circular eyes and a small, subtle mouth, giving it a friendly yet mechanical appearance. The torso is partially open, revealing internal mechanical components and a central spine-like structure, while the arms and legs are segmented with visible joints for flexibility. The robot has a unique color scheme, primarily white and gray with orange accents at the hips and a single black foot. A cylindrical module is attached to its lower back, connected by a coiled cable, suggesting a power or control unit. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for urban environments where interaction with humans is expected.
description: A modern humanoid robot with articulated limbs, a visible mechanical torso, and a cylindrical module attached to its back. It features a white and gray color scheme with orange accents and expressive facial elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's face, chest details, and both arms and legs, with the cylindrical module placed beside it.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical module attached to the lower back and the coiled cable running up the spine.
description_view_2: Rear view exposing the robot's mechanical spine, back structure, and the cylindrical module fully attached.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the coiled cable and the segmented limb structure, with the black foot more visible.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms relaxed at the sides, legs straight, and head facing forward. The torso is upright and the robot appears at rest.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; the robot has integrated panels and exposed mechanical components with no visible clothing or decorative coverings.
attribute_facial_features: The face has two large, round eyes and a small, subtle mouth, with no visible nose or expressive elements. The features are simple and mechanical.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs are segmented with visible hinge and rotary joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, knees, and ankles, allowing for a wide range of motion. Hands and feet are simple, with no visible fingers.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two camera-like eyes on the face; no other sensors are clearly visible.
